title: Dorian: a human-in-the-loop framework for the assisted design of data science pipelines (thesis-companion release)
description:
Reference implementation of Dorian, cited in the PhD thesis Assisted Design of End-to-End Data Science Pipelines (Sergey Redyuk, TU Berlin, 2026). This snapshot includes the recommendation engine, the Experiment Store, the DS Pipeline Extractor (AST-based), the runtime observability layer, the three-lateral background generation engine (AutoML wrappers, reinforcement-learning agent, KB-driven Cartesian-product enumeration), the data-quality validator, and the prediction-validation prototype.

Active development continues at github.com/dorianlab/dorian; this Zenodo record is a frozen snapshot of the state cited in the thesis.
